title: carex × helvola subsp. tetrastachya
intro: Carex × helvola subsp. tetrastachya is a hybrid subspecies of sedge, a type of flowering plant, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is valued for its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation, as well as its antioxidant and antibacterial properties, which can contribute to overall health and well-being. The health benefits of Carex × helvola subsp. tetrastachya include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce menstrual cramps, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
